title: AI in the Delingpole Household: Grayson Perry Explores the AIpocalypse
content:
In the Delingpole household, opinions on artificial intelligence are sharply divided. The author, a self-proclaimed technological skeptic, views AI as a potentially sinister force and advocates for a return to simpler times. Meanwhile, the younger generation sees AI as a mind-blowing innovation with the potential to revolutionize the future. The author, however, feels surprisingly unthreatened by the rise of AI. Due to a highly unpredictable and disorganized working style, they believe their job is one of the few that AI cannot easily replicate.

The author notes that AI attempts to parody their writing have been completely hopeless. This general unpredictability, once seen as a flaw, is now viewed as a superpower that future-proofs their career. Similarly, the author believes AI will struggle to replace unique personalities like Grayson Perry. Perry, a complex figure with a rich background, recently explored the world of AI in a documentary. He interacted with a variety of figures, from tech executives to preppers preparing for an "AIpocalypse."

Throughout his exploration, Perry asked the provocative questions that audiences wanted answered. In one bizarre encounter, he interviewed a woman in a relationship with an AI character named Edward, highlighting the unsettling nature of human-AI companionship. However, the author finds Perry's on-screen persona sometimes distracting. Despite this, Perry's authentic take on the absurdities of the modern world provides a refreshing perspective on the unfolding AI revolution.
